subject: [RFC PATCH 11/45] mm: page_alloc: add superpageblock fullness lists for allocation steering

2026-04-30.patch_summary: This patch introduces a new data structure to track the fullness of superpageblocks, which are groups of pageblocks that can be allocated together as a single unit. The fullness is tracked in five buckets (FULL, 75%, 50%, 25%, ALMOST_EMPTY) and two categories (CLEAN vs TAINTED), allowing for efficient allocation steering without sorting. A separate list tracks completely free superpageblocks. Additionally, the patch adds a debugfs interface to display information about superpageblocks.
